landing.hero.subtitle: Track your reading journey, discover new books, curate your personal Hall of Fame, and connect with fellow readers worldwide.
landing.features.section.title: Everything You Need to Read Better
landing.features.section.subtitle: All the features you need to track, discover, and share your reading journey
landing.features.smart-library.title: Smart Library Management
landing.features.smart-library.descripti: Organize your books with custom filters: Want to Read, Reading, Read. Filter by ratings and track your progress effortlessly.
landing.features.discover.title: Discover & Explore
landing.features.discover.description: Search through thousands of books, find detailed information, and browse multiple editions to pick your perfect cover.
landing.features.social.title: Social Reading Network
landing.features.social.description: Search for readers, add friends, and follow their reading activities. See what your friends are reading in real-time.
landing.features.hall-of-fame.title: Hall of Fame
landing.features.hall-of-fame.descriptio: Curate your favorite books in a personal Hall of Fame and add your favorite quotes from each masterpiece.
landing.features.editions.title: Multiple Editions
landing.features.editions.description: Choose from different book editions to customize your library with the cover art you love most.
landing.features.activity.title: Activity Feed
landing.features.activity.description: Stay connected with your reading community. View your activity and your friends' reading progress and updates.
landing.cta.title: Connect with Fellow Book Lovers
landing.cta.description: Build meaningful connections with readers who share your literary interests. Follow their activities, exchange recommendations, and grow your reading community.
landing.footer.description: Discover, share, and connect with other readers.
